Instead of burning through half a tank of gas getting your shopping done all around town, try switching it up and running all your errands under one roof. Costco is a great option if you want to simplify how you shop, and right now, you can get a $20 Digital Costco Shop Card* with your Gold Star Membership one-year subscription, and it’s still only $65.

items.title: Free up some storage space and watch your MacBook bloom with MacMagic at $70 off
items.summary:
MacBooks are some of the best laptops money can buy. Not only are they incredibly intuitive, but their premium build and performance make them a sure bet for multi-year use. That said, this longevity also comes with its fair share of drawbacks. For one, things get lost very easily, and after a few years of use, storage space is bound to be a finite resource. With MacMagic, however, you don’t have to manually declutter your Mac. It not only clears your caches, but it also simplifies your workflow thanks to its management capabilities and system hacks. Better yet, you can get your lifetime license to the app for just $29.99 (Reg. $99.99). After all, who wants to spend even more money after already investing in a Mac?
